title: aloe perfoliata var. depressa
intro: Aloe perfoliata var. depressa, also known as the flat-leaved aloe or flat aloe, is a species of succulent plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, such as aloin and aloe-emodin, that can help soothe and heal burns, wounds, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Aloe perfoliata var. depressa include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially reducing symptoms of digestive issues such as constipation and irritable bowel syndrome. Aloe perfoliata var. depressa can be prepared as a topical gel or juice, and is also used in herbal medicine as a powder or capsule, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and interactions with other medications.
